title: Stainless Steel Pots and Pans Set – 8pcs Cookware with Glass Lids – Induction Hob Pot Set – Cooking Saucepan Pots & Frying Pan Set – by Nuovva
features: 8PCs STAINLESS STEEL SET: The multipurpose cooking set by Nuovva includes two frying pans (20cm and 24cm), one sauté pan with lid (24cm), and two stockpots with lids (20cm 2.7L and 24cm 4.3L). Perfect for frying, sautéing, simmering, and slow cooking, offering flexibility for every meal!

HIGH QUALITY TRI-PLY STRUCTURE: Fabricated with three layers (304 stainless steel + aluminium + 430 stainless steel) for superior heat distribution and durability. The steel core ensures fast, even cooking without hot spots, while the polished stainless steel finish adds a sleek, professional touch. Built for long-lasting performance in any kitchen!

PRACTICAL GLASS LIDS: Our transparent lids allow you to monitor the inside while cooking, helping to retain heat and moisture for enriched flavours, the stainless steel knobs provide a secure, durable grip for easy handling, designed to withstand high temperatures for safe and efficient cooking!

SECURE RIVETED HANDLES: Featuring securely riveted handles, this cookware set by Nuovva ensures a stable and reliable grip while cooking, the heat-resistant design keeps handles cool on the stovetop for added safety and comfort. With a blend of durability and elegance, these handles are built to last and enhance your kitchen experience!

ADAPTABLE & RESILIENT: Designed for compatibility with all stovetops—induction, gas, electric, and open flame—this cookware adapts to any cooking setup. Its satin-polished finish prevents staining and simplifies cleanup, keeping it looking pristine. For ultimate convenience, it’s also dishwasher safe, ensuring effortless maintenance and lasting brilliance!
